<!--
Thanks for contributing to Chrona! Please skim CONTRIBUTING.md before opening
a PR. Keep diffs focused — one logical change per PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Lead with the user-visible effect, then the
implementation. One paragraph or a short bulleted list. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change right? Link the related issue if there is one
(`Closes #123`). For larger changes, an issue should already exist. -->

## Changes

<!-- A short bulleted list of the substantive changes. Skip the noise
(formatting, renames, etc.). -->

-
-

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Tick everything that applies. -->

- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` is clean
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a new unit/integration test
- [ ] Performance-sensitive paths have a criterion benchmark delta in the PR body
- [ ] N/A (docs / chore only)

## Compatibility

<!-- Tick the box that applies. -->

- [ ] No public API changes
- [ ] Additive API change (1.x compatible)
- [ ] Breaking API change (requires 2.0)
- [ ] On-disk format change (requires major version bump per FORMAT.md)

## Docs

- [ ] Updated relevant section of `README.md` / `ARCHITECTURE.md` / `FORMAT.md` / `docs/`
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] N/A

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should look at first, or known limitations. -->
